name: Week 1 Day 5 Morning Flow
description: Quick hip primer before Legs day. Just mobility and stretching — no core, no pushups, no leg work. Open up the hips, wake up the spine, get out the door.

exercises.notes: Slow — wake up the spine. Exhale cat, inhale cow.
Squat to standing, head stays down. Opens up the squat pattern.
30s each side. Push hips forward. Your hip flexors need this before squats.
Pulse hips forward and back. Opens inner hips and groin.
30s each side. Rock gently. Gets deep into glutes.
Pedal out the feet. Hamstrings and calves — both about to get worked.
Touch toes, drop into deep squat, stand. Rehearsing the squat pattern.

tips: This is a 15-minute hip primer — NOT a workout
No core, no pushups, no leg exercises. Save your legs for squats.
The goal is to open up your hips so your squat depth is better at the gym
Dynamic malasana and squat-to-stand are rehearsing the squat movement pattern
If you're short on time, just do cat-cow + hip flexor stretch + squat-to-stand
